all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
And God said unto Moses, I Am That I Am: and he said, Thus shalt thou say unto the children of Israel, I Am hath sent me unto you.
Exodus 3:14
Quote of the Day
"God’s commandments and counsel are found in the scriptures and the words of His servants."
President D. Todd Christofferson | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
